def negative_string_join_without_generator():
    rule_id = "string_join_without_generator"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "String joins that materialize an unnecessary list comprehension instead of using a generator or direct iterable."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
